nasb.text: For which one of you, when he wants to build a tower, does not first sit down and calculate the cost to see if he has enough to complete it?

esv.text: For which of you, desiring to build a tower, does not first sit down and count the cost, whether he has enough to complete it?

cnv.text: 你們當中有誰要蓋一座樓，不先坐下計算費用，能不能蓋成呢？

ccb.text: “哪有人建楼房不事先坐下来计算成本，看能否建成？

csbs.text: “你们当中到底有谁想盖一座楼，不先坐下来计算费用，看自己是否能够完成呢？
